positive: A vibrant, minimalist geometric pattern illustration featuring a central, stylized constellation of glowing, interconnected geometric shapes (triangles, pentagons, circles). The design must be rendered in a clean silhouette style, with deep midnight blue and cosmic teal colors contrasting sharply against a clean, off-white background. The composition should be perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Use a blend of Art Deco geometry and celestial motifs, emphasizing clean lines, high contrast, and a sense of magical depth. Studio lighting, vector illustration quality, 4k resolution, print-optimized.
negative: text, blurry, watermark, signature, logo, dirty, low detail, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, noisy, artifacts, excessive shadows
